changes.summary: CreateCommunityUseCase response shape aligned with pre-extraction communities.create (removed legacy postingRules/votingRules/visibilityRules/meritRules from create payload).
Canonical BC-01 ensureUserInBaseCommunities logic (four base hubs, global wallet, welcome merits, participant role + community wallet per hub).

UserService.ensureUserInBaseCommunities delegates to ProvisionBaseMembershipUseCase (PublicationService pattern); removes ~280 lines of duplicate inline logic so all 13 call sites route through the use case.
users.ensureBaseCommunities calls UserService.ensureUserInBaseCommunities (facade to use case); users.assignLead delegates to AssignLeadUseCase.
communities.create, acceptCommunityInvite, update, getMembers, leaveCommunity delegate to respective BC-01 use cases.

notes: user.service.ts edited outside nominal write_set to satisfy provision call-site coverage (mirrors p4-create-publication-uc domain-service delegation). UserService.assignLead duplicate retained; only router path uses AssignLeadUseCase.
